import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { GraduationCap, Upload, Plus, Edit, Trash2, Users, Star, DollarSign, BookOpen } from 'lucide-react'; const InstructorPage = () => { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('dashboard'); const [showUploadModal, setShowUploadModal] = useState(false); const instructorStats = { totalCourses: 12, totalStudents: 3450, totalRevenue: 125000, avgRating: 4.7 }; const myCourses = [ {id:1, title:'React Masterclass', students:450, rating:4.8, revenue:45000, status:'Published'}, {id:2, title:'Node.js Backend', students:320, rating:4.6, revenue:32000, status:'Published'}, {id:3, title:'MongoDB Basics', students:180, rating:4.9, revenue:18000, status:'Draft'} ]; const CourseUploadModal = () => (

Upload New Course

Click to upload or drag and drop

); return (
{/* Header */}

Instructor Dashboard

{/* Stats Cards */}

Total Courses

{instructorStats.totalCourses}

Total Students

{instructorStats.totalStudents.toLocaleString()}

Total Revenue

₹{instructorStats.totalRevenue.toLocaleString()}

Avg Rating

{instructorStats.avgRating}

{/* Tabs */}
{['dashboard', 'courses', 'analytics'].map(tab => ( ))}
{activeTab === 'courses' && (

My Courses

{myCourses.map(course => (

{course.title}

{course.students} students {course.rating} ₹{course.revenue.toLocaleString()} {course.status}
))}
)} {activeTab === 'dashboard' && (

Recent Activity

New student enrolled in React Masterclass

)} {activeTab === 'analytics' && (

+8% from last month

)}
{showUploadModal && }
); }; export default InstructorPage;
